HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS PETER POON and ROCKY POON's Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Kenny Tseng To Plaintiff Rocky Poon?S Interrogatory 15.1.

Court interpreter Ms. Lain is excused as counsel's clients are not present at today's hearing.
